mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, memo, scheduled_date, priority, xp, completed, created_at, completed_at FROM tasks WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY scheduled_date ASC, created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks(user_id, title, memo, scheduled_date, priority, xp, completed, created_at, completed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{memo}, #{scheduledDate}, #{priority}, #{xp}, #{completed}, NOW(), #{completedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET completed = #{completed}, completed_at = CASE WHEN #{completed} = TRUE THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
